title: eumecanthus astroites
side_effects: Eumecanthus astroites can have side effects if used improperly, such as skin irritation, allergic reactions, and digestive issues. In some cases, consuming the plant can lead to nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea due to the presence of toxic compounds. Overuse of the plant can also cause headaches, dizziness, and respiratory problems, particularly for individuals with pre-existing conditions. Additionally, improper use of Eumecanthus astroites may interact with certain medications, exacerbating their side effects or reducing their efficacy.
